scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (customers, tickets, invoices, estimates, assets); legacy ships no writes (capabilities.write is false) and the full RepairShopr surface (line items, payments, appointments, users, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B.
